arts.ttl: Aston Villa Set to Challenge PSG for €15M-Rated Turkish Standout
arts.sum: Paris Saint-Germain have struggled to score goals in the UEFA Champions League, and manager Luis Enrique has not counted on Randal Kolo Muani. At some point, the capital club needs to pursue a No. 9 to challenge Gonçalo Ramos. arts.ttl: Liverpool, Man City on Alert as Leipzig Seek Advantage for PSG’s Rising Star
arts.sum: Paris Saint-Germain opted for a short-term move by loaning Xavi Simons to RB Leipzig for another season. However, next summer, the club is expected to make a long-term call, potentially through a transfer sale. In September, journalist Christian Falk reported that Manchester City and Liverpool are monitoring Simons’ situation closely. arts.ttl: 'A rebuild gone too far' - is PSG's youth project working?
arts.sum: Julien Laurens, Mark Chapman and Danny Murphy discuss Paris St-Germain's youth "reset", as their ongoing Champions League struggles.

arts.ttl: How Champions League table stands - Real, PSG & Man City in trouble?
arts.sum: With three games to go in the revamped Champions League's new 36-team league phase, who is on track to progress and who could be in danger?

arts.ttl: Ousmane Dembélé’s Erratic Performances at PSG Echo Past Barcelona Inconsistencies
arts.sum: Many expected Ousmane Dembélé to elevate his game a little after Kylian Mbappé’s departure last summer. However, the Frenchman has had a frustrating 2024-25 season. arts.ttl: Rio Ferdinand Warns Man Utd Over Pursuing Barcelona, PSG’s €70M-Rated Transfer Target
arts.sum: As 2025 approaches, Viktor Gyökeres is drawing attention from several top European clubs, with Sporting Lisbon reportedly ready to sell their star striker. However, one club seems to be ahead in their pursuit of the Swedish forward.
